headlines.title: Cruise ship at center of suspected deadly hantavirus outbreak refused permission to dock
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of a deadly outbreak of hantavirus has been refused permission to dock, with 149 people still on board — two of them seriously ill

headlines.title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
headlines.description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

headlines.title: What does it take to protect brain health? 10 habits to start now
headlines.description: Brain health is of paramount importance to nearly all Americans, yet few are aware of the latest science on how to nurture it

headlines.title: Pancreatic cancer mRNA vaccine shows lasting results in an early trial
headlines.description: Nearly all of the patients who responded to the a personalized mRNA pancreatic vaccine are still alive six years later.

headlines.title: Critics slam medical credit cards as patient shares account of being signed up in hospital
headlines.description: An emergency room patient shares her story of being signed up for a line of credit to pay for medical bills. Now, some states are trying to curb the use of medical credit cards as patients raise red flags of high interest rates and credit impact. NBC News' Steve Patterson reports.

headlines.title: Federal appeals court rules that abortion drugs cannot be sent by mail
headlines.description: A federal appeals court has ruled that the abortion drug mifepristone cannot be sent to patients by mail. Telehealth prescriptions have been key to maintaining abortion access in states that outlawed or restricted the practice after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in 2022.

headlines.title: Boost Your Mood With These Energizing Habit Stacks
headlines.description: TODAY fitness contributor Stephanie Mansour stops by Studio 1A to share tips for building habit stacks to get you energized and feeling positive. Tips include eating mood-boosting foods early in the day like Joy Bauer’s chocolate protein bites, walking on tip toes before sitting on the couch, and winding down the night with a cup of tea.

headlines.title: Trump pulls Casey Means' nomination for surgeon general
headlines.description: President Trump announced that he was pulling the nomination of Dr. Casey Means for surgeon general, and announced that she would be replaced with Dr. Nicole Saphier, who is listed on Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center's website as a radiologist and director of breast imaging at its facility in Monmouth County, New Jersey. She has also regularly appeared as a medical contributor on Fox News.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: Expert-approved walking pads that help you sit less and move more
headlines.description: Fitness trainers share the benefits of using walking pads daily for up to 60 mins. and safety tips. Plus, shop the best expert-approved walking pads.

headlines.title: The best spin shoes of 2026, according to spin instructors
headlines.description: Our experts share their favorite spin shoes, plus what to look for in fit and feel. Shop picks from Shimano, Tiem, Peloton and more.
